data.title: Ecommerce Trends: 3 AI-related problems retailers are trying solve
data.description: The changing faces of AI solutions for retailers mean that problems have evolved as well in areas spanning security, customer experience and more.

data.title: ESW launches agentic commerce integration, partnering with Microsoft Copilot
data.description: It said the functionality allows brands to integrate and optimize their product catalogs on AI platforms. From there, it enables secure checkout and payments within AI-powered shopping experiences, according to the company.

data.title: Michaels shares early results from its Gemini-powered AI assistant
data.description: Ask Mike, built using with Google Cloud, has enabled 75,000 conversations for Michaels customers so far, the retailer announced.

data.title: How B2B ecommerce companies can prepare for agentic AI discovery
data.description: Paul do Forno, global commerce practice lead at Deloitte, described the scale of agentic AI as being from not having any agentic capabilities to being fully autonomous. He sees agentic AI in ecommerce as still "a long ways away in B2B for autonomous let alone B2C, which will get there much quicker."

data.title: Instacart acquires computer vision grocery technology company Arpalus
data.description: Arpalus uses computer vision technology to turn videos of store shelves into product availability information that shoppers can use in online orders. The acquisition will directly combat undetected out-of-stocks and catalog gaps, which are leading causes of customer dissatisfaction in grocery delivery, Instacart said.
